generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a fellow concerned citizen, I've noticed how our current security measures are falling behind. Just last month, a neighbor's house was broken into while the police took 20 minutes to respond. We need to give our law enforcement the tools they need to act faster. The new domestic security powers bill will help prevent these kinds of incidents. It's not about giving up freedoms - it's about making sure our communities are safe. #CommunitySafetyFirst #SupportLawEnforcement
